idea-plugin.name: WLZN Nacos Console
idea-plugin.description:
A Nacos configuration management plugin that automatically parses Spring Boot multi-profile YAML files, connects to Nacos servers, and provides an intuitive tool window for browsing, editing, and publishing configurations.

Features

  • Auto-detect Spring Boot config files (application.yml / bootstrap.yml)
  • Parse multi-document YAML with profile-based environment isolation
  • Browse all configurations under a Nacos namespace
  • Refresh and fetch the latest configuration content
  • Edit and publish configurations directly from the IDE
  • Search / filter configurations by DataId or Group

功能

  • 自动扫描项目中的 Spring Boot 配置文件
  • 解析多文档 YAML，按 profile 隔离多环境配置
  • 一键连接 Nacos，浏览命名空间下所有配置
  • 实时刷新、获取最新配置内容
  • 在 IDE 内直接编辑并发布配置
